description: Deterministic failure classification for self-healing pipeline. Used to route recovery workers and set health state.

categories.description: Worker exceeded its time budget without producing a PR or blocker comment.
detectionSignals: Worker heartbeat stale beyond timeout threshold
No PR opened and no blocker comment within budget window
Launcher kill event with timeout reason
categories.recoveryAction: Retry with reduced scope or split the task into smaller slices.

categories.description: Worker exited without producing any output (no PR, no comment, no label update).
detectionSignals: Worker process exited non-zero with empty stdout
No GitHub API calls recorded for the worker session
Issue remains in agent:in-progress with no linked PR
categories.recoveryAction: Diagnose worker environment, relaunch with debug logging enabled.

categories.description: Worker edited files outside its allowedFiles boundary.
detectionSignals: git diff shows changes in forbidden paths
Scope guard or ops:guard check fails
PR diff includes files not listed in allowedFiles
categories.recoveryAction: Revert the out-of-scope changes, relaunch with corrected allowedFiles.

categories.description: Worker did not run required validation commands before opening PR.
detectionSignals: PR body missing validation commands section
No npm run check or npm run build evidence in PR
Worker log shows no validation step execution
categories.recoveryAction: Request the worker to run validation and update the PR with evidence.

categories.description: Worker ran validation but one or more checks failed (check, build, test, guard).
detectionSignals: npm run check exits non-zero
npm run build exits non-zero
npm run ops:guard exits non-zero
Test suite exits with failures
categories.recoveryAction: Fix the validation failures in the PR branch before merge.

categories.description: Main branch health state is red; only recovery workers may launch.
detectionSignals: main-health.json state field is red
Post-merge health gate reports critical failure
Type-check or build fails on main
categories.recoveryAction: Launch a foundation-fix recovery worker to restore main to green.

categories.description: Generated code (Prisma client, OpenAPI types) is stale or missing relative to schema.
detectionSignals: npm run prisma:generate exits non-zero
Generated type mismatches against current schema
Import references to types not present in generated output
categories.recoveryAction: Regenerate the client and commit updated generated files.

categories.description: Documentation or policy file contradicts the current source-of-truth.
detectionSignals: docs-authority-map check flags a conflict
CLAUDE.md references outdated file paths or commands
Policy file references removed or renamed artifacts
categories.recoveryAction: Update the docs to match the current source-of-truth.

categories.description: Persistent state (labels, health markers, issue states) is inconsistent with actual repository state.
detectionSignals: Issue labeled agent:done but PR is still open
Health marker shows green but build is failing
Label applied but no corresponding state transition recorded
categories.recoveryAction: Reconcile the state markers with actual repository and CI state.

categories.description: Secrets, tokens, or credentials were exposed in committed code, PR body, or comments.
detectionSignals: Commit diff contains patterns matching API keys or tokens
PR body or comment includes raw secret values
Env file or credential file committed to the repository
categories.recoveryAction: Rotate the exposed secret, scrub from history, and add guardrails.

categories.description: A migration or schema change would destroy data without backup or rollback path.
detectionSignals: Prisma migration contains DROP TABLE without backup step
Migration alters column type in a way that truncates data
No rollback migration provided for a destructive change
categories.recoveryAction: Add backup step, create rollback migration, and re-validate safety.

categories.description: Authentication or authorization behavior regressed (broken guards, leaked roles, bypassed checks).
detectionSignals: Auth guard test failures after merge
Role-based access control check no longer enforced
JWT or session validation logic removed or weakened
categories.recoveryAction: Restore the auth behavior, add regression tests, and verify guard coverage.

categories.description: Two parallel workers produced logically conflicting changes that pass individually but conflict semantically.
detectionSignals: Two PRs modify the same service with opposing logic
Type compiles but runtime behavior contradicts between PRs
Integration test passes in isolation but fails when both PRs are merged
categories.recoveryAction: Rebase one PR onto the other, resolve the semantic conflict, re-validate.

categories.description: Worker or pipeline exceeded the configured cost or resource budget.
detectionSignals: API cost exceeds the per-worker budget threshold
CI compute minutes exceed the wave budget
Repeated retries consumed resources beyond allocation
categories.recoveryAction: Review budget allocation, optimize the task scope, or adjust thresholds.

categories.description: LLM token usage exceeded the configured context or completion budget for a worker session.
detectionSignals: Token count exceeds the per-task budget
Context window overflow caused truncation of required context
Repeated context resets consumed tokens beyond allocation
categories.recoveryAction: Split the task into smaller slices or optimize prompt efficiency.

critical.label: Critical
critical.description: Blocks all non-recovery worker launches. Requires immediate recovery action.

warning.label: Warning
warning.description: Limits workers to fix-only and docs types. Does not block the pipeline entirely.

green.label: Green
green.description: All checks pass. All worker types may launch.

yellow.label: Yellow
yellow.description: Non-critical failure. Only foundation-fix, docs, test-only, and health-gate workers may launch.

red.label: Red
red.description: Critical failure. Only foundation-fix and health-gate recovery workers may launch.
